jsonLd.name: Image to SVG Converter

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The homepage is designed as a free image to SVG converter for common image formats such as PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP. Optional account features can support saved files, batch tools, and higher limits.

mainEntity.name: Can I convert an image to SVG for free?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP are the main image formats for the image to SVG workflow. Each format also has a dedicated converter page with more specific instructions.

mainEntity.name: Can I convert PNG, JPG, and WebP to SVG?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Image to SVG conversion usually means vectorizing a raster image into scalable SVG output. The best results come from logos, icons, sketches, signatures, line art, and illustrations with clear shapes.

vectorInfo.description1: This tool is designed for image to SVG conversion when assets benefit from vector output: logos, icons, sketches, signatures, line art, illustrations, and simple graphics.

faq.description: Clear answers about image vectorization, format support, and SVG export workflows.
faq.title: Common Questions

items.answer: Yes. The homepage is designed as a free image to SVG converter for common image formats such as PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP. Optional account features can support saved files, batch tools, and higher limits.
items.question: Can I convert an image to SVG for free?

items.answer: Yes. PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP are the main image formats for the image to SVG workflow. Each format also has a dedicated converter page with more specific instructions.
items.question: Can I convert PNG, JPG, and WebP to SVG?

items.answer: Yes. Image to SVG conversion usually means vectorizing a raster image into scalable SVG output. The best results come from logos, icons, sketches, signatures, line art, and illustrations with clear shapes.
items.question: Is this an image vectorizer?

items.answer: The goal is to create clean SVG output that can be opened in design and development tools. Editability depends on the source image and conversion settings, but SVG is designed for scalable vector workflows.
items.question: Will the SVG file be editable?

items.answer: You can convert photos to SVG, but detailed photos often produce stylized vector results rather than perfect replicas. For clean SVG paths, use images with strong contrast, simple shapes, and clear edges.
items.question: Can I convert a photo to SVG?

items.answer: The public launch supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WebP to SVG, plus SVG to PNG export. SVG to JPG, SVG to WebP, and document formats can be added as separate workflows later.
items.question: Which formats are supported now?

items.answer: No sign-up is required for your first preview. Sign in to download clean SVG files or use credits for more generations.
items.question: Do I need to sign up?

items.answer: The upload flow is designed to keep privacy information visible and easy to find. Check the privacy policy before uploading sensitive brand assets or client files.
items.question: Are uploaded files private?
